audit_items.proof_trace: AcquireRandomInfoThreadSet returns NULL on memory allocation failure. AddNoiseImage does not check the return value before dereferencing random_info[id] at line 377 (and line 326 if OPENMP enabled), causing NULL pointer dereference.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker causes memory exhaustion leading to allocation failure, triggering NULL dereference in AddNoiseImage and denial-of-service.
